beskrivelse.no: Risikoer knyttet til IoT-enheter, embedded systems og OT (Operational Technology)
beskrivelse.en: Risks related to IoT-devices, embedded systems and OT (Operational Technology)

risikoelement.no: IoT-enheter med default credentials
risikoelement.en: IoT-devices with default credentials

saarbarhet.no: Admin/admin, root/root, hardkodet factory password
saarbarhet.en: Admin/admin, root/root, hardkodet factory password

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Force password change ved first boot, unique per-enhet credentials, certificate-based auth
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Force password change during first boot, unique per-device credentials, certificate-based auth

risikoelement.no: Manglende firmware-oppdateringer på IoT-enheter
risikoelement.en: Missing firmware-updates on IoT-devices

saarbarhet.no: Ingen OTA (over-the-air) update, manuell firmware-oppdatering
saarbarhet.en: No OTA (over-the-air) update, manuell firmware-updating

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Automated OTA updates, signed firmware, rollback mechanism, update overvåking
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Automated OTA updates, signed firmware, rollback mechanism, update monitoring

risikoelement.no: Ukryptert kommunikasjon fra IoT-enhet til backend
risikoelement.en: unencrypted communications from IoT-device to backend

saarbarhet.no: HTTP i stedet for HTTPS, ingen TLS, plaintext MQTT
saarbarhet.en: HTTP is used instead of HTTPS, there is no TLS, and MQTT traffic is sent in plaintext

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Mandatory TLS/DTLS, certificate pinning, encrypted MQTT (TLS), VPN for legacy enheter
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Mandatory TLS/DTLS, certificate pinning, encrypted MQTT (TLS), VPN for legacy devices

risikoelement.no: Fysisk tilgang til enhet gir full kontroll
risikoelement.en: Physical access to the device provides full control

saarbarhet.no: Debug ports åpne, ingen secure boot, ukryptert storage
saarbarhet.en: Debug ports are open, secure boot is missing, and storage is unencrypted

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Secure boot, encrypted storage, disabled debug ports, tamper detection
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Secure boot, encrypted storage, disabled debug ports, tamper detection

risikoelement.no: Enhet kan brukes som inngangsport til OT-nettverk
risikoelement.en: A device can be used as an entry point into the OT network

saarbarhet.no: IoT-enheter på samme VLAN som SCADA/ICS
saarbarhet.en: IoT devices share the same VLAN as SCADA or ICS systems

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Air-gapped OT nettverk, industrial DMZ, IDS/IPS, micro-segmentation
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Air-gapped OT network, industrial DMZ, IDS/IPS, micro-segmentation

risikoelement.no: Usignert eller uverifisert firmware kan installeres
risikoelement.en: Usignert or uverifisert firmware can installeres

saarbarhet.no: Manglende signature verification, unsigned updates
saarbarhet.en: Missing signature verification, unsigned updates

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Mandatory code signing, secure boot chain, hardware root of trust (TPM/TEE)
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Mandatory code signing, secure boot chain, hardware root of trust (TPM/TEE)

risikoelement.no: Hardkodede credentials eller secrets i firmware
risikoelement.en: Hardcoded credentials or secrets in firmware

saarbarhet.no: API keys, krypteringsnøkler og passord er innebygd i binærfilen
saarbarhet.en: API keys, encryption keys, passwords embedded in binary

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Secure element for key storage, runtime key injection, no hardcoded secrets
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Secure element for key storage, runtime key injection, no hardcoded secrets

risikoelement.no: Buffer overflow eller memory corruption i embedded kode
risikoelement.en: Buffer overflow or memory corruption in embedded code

saarbarhet.no: Usikker C/C++ kode, manglende bounds checking
saarbarhet.en: Insecure C/C++ code, missing bounds checking

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Memory-safe languages (Rust), ASLR, stack canaries, fuzzing, SAST
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Memory-safe languages (Rust), ASLR, stack canaries, fuzzing, SAST

risikoelement.no: Firmware kan dumpes og reverse engineeres
risikoelement.en: Firmware can dumpes and reverse engineeres

saarbarhet.no: Ukryptert firmware, ingen obfuscation, debug symbols
saarbarhet.en: unencrypted firmware, no obfuscation, debug symbols

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Encrypted firmware, code obfuscation, strip debug symbols, IP protection
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Encrypted firmware, code obfuscation, strip debug symbols, IP protection

risikoelement.no: Legacy OT-system uten sikkerhetsoppdateringer
risikoelement.en: Legacy OT-system without security patches

saarbarhet.no: Utdaterte SCADA-systemer, embedded Windows XP, leverandør support ended
saarbarhet.en: Utdaterte SCADA-systems, embedded Windows XP, vendor support ended

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Virtual patching, nettverk isolation, compensating controls, upgrade path
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Virtual patching, network isolation, compensating controls, upgrade path

risikoelement.no: USB eller removable media introduserer malware til OT
risikoelement.en: USB or removable media introduserer malware to OT

saarbarhet.no: USB ports åpne, ingen enhet control
saarbarhet.en: USB ports are open and there is no device control

foreslaatteTiltak.no: USB port blocking, kiosk mode, media sanitization station, endpoint protection
foreslaatteTiltak.en: USB port blocking, kiosk mode, media sanitization station, endpoint protection

risikoelement.no: Ukrypterte industrielle protokoller (Modbus, DNP3)
risikoelement.en: Ukrypterte industrielle protokoller (Modbus, DNP3)

saarbarhet.no: Legacy protocols uten encryption, man-in-the-middle mulig
saarbarhet.en: Legacy protocols without encryption, man-in-the-middle possible

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Protocol gateways, VPN overlays, IDS signatures, Purdue model segmentation
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Protocol gateways, VPN overlays, IDS signatures, Purdue model segmentation

risikoelement.no: IT/OT convergence introduserer nye angrepsvektorer
risikoelement.en: IT/OT convergence introduserer nye angrepsvektorer

saarbarhet.no: Remote tilgang fra IT til OT, sky connectivity
saarbarhet.en: Remote access from IT to OT, cloud connectivity

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Industrial DMZ, unidirectional gateways, jump hosts, anomaly detection
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Industrial DMZ, unidirectional gateways, jump hosts, anomaly detection

risikoelement.no: Utilsiktet shutdown av kritisk infrastruktur
risikoelement.en: Accidental shutdown of critical infrastruktur

saarbarhet.no: Manglende change control, uforutsette effekter av endringer
saarbarhet.en: Missing change control, uforutsette effekter of endringer

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Digital twins for testing, staged rollouts, emergency stop procedures
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Digital twins for testing, staged rollouts, emergency stop procedures

risikoelement.no: IoT sky platform kompromittert
risikoelement.en: IoT cloud platform kompromittert

saarbarhet.no: Sentral kontroll over alle enheter, single point of failure
saarbarhet.en: Central control over all devices creates a single point of failure

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Zero trust architecture, enhet authentication, encrypted commands, audit loggføring
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Zero trust architecture, device authentication, encrypted commands, audit logging

risikoelement.no: DDoS-angrep fra botnet av kompromitterte IoT-enheter
risikoelement.en: DDoS-angrep from botnet of kompromitterte IoT-devices

saarbarhet.no: Millioner av enheter kan utnyttes til amplification attacks
saarbarhet.en: Millioner of devices can utnyttes to amplification attacks

foreslaatteTiltak.no: enhet health overvåking, anomaly detection, kill switch, DDoS mitigation
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Device health monitoring, anomaly detection, kill switch, DDoS mitigation

risikoelement.no: Sårbart IoT API eksponert på internett
risikoelement.en: A vulnerable IoT API is exposed on the internet

saarbarhet.no: OWASP API Top 10, broken object-level authorization
saarbarhet.en: OWASP API Top 10, broken object-level authorization

foreslaatteTiltak.no: API gateway, rate limiting, OAuth scopes, input validation, WAF
foreslaatteTiltak.en: API gateway, rate limiting, OAuth scopes, input validation, WAF

risikoelement.no: Datalekkasje fra telemetri/sensor data
risikoelement.en: Datalekkasje from telemetri/sensor data

saarbarhet.no: Sensitive data i telemetry, persondata fra sensorer
saarbarhet.en: Sensitive data in telemetry, personal data from sensorer

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Data minimization, edge processing, anonymization, encryption at rest
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Data minimization, edge processing, anonymization, encryption at rest

risikoelement.no: Kompromitterte enheter fra produsent
risikoelement.en: Kompromitterte devices from produsent

saarbarhet.no: Malware pre-installed, backdoors i firmware
saarbarhet.en: Malware pre-installed, backdoors in firmware

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Sikkerhetsrevisjon av leverandør, firmwarevalidering, sikker leverandørkjede og attestering
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Vendor security audit, firmware validation, secure supply chain, attestation

risikoelement.no: Counterfeit eller cloned IoT-enheter
risikoelement.en: Counterfeit or cloned IoT-devices

saarbarhet.no: Manglende enhet attestation, ukjent hardware origin
saarbarhet.en: Missing device attestation, unknown hardware origin

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Hardware attestation, unique enhet IDs, secure elements, supply chain verification
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Hardware attestation, unique device IDs, secure elements, supply chain verification

risikoelement.no: Mangel på firmware- og sikkerhetsoppdateringer etter EOL
risikoelement.en: Mangel on firmware/security updates after EOL

saarbarhet.no: leverandør discontinues support, no update path
saarbarhet.en: Vendor discontinues support, no update path

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Lifecycle planning, replacement budget, open-source firmware option, long-term support agreements
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Lifecycle planning, replacement budget, open-source firmware option, long-term support agreements

risikoelement.no: Kompromittert edge gateway gir tilgang til alle downstream enheter
risikoelement.en: A compromised edge gateway provides access to all downstream devices

saarbarhet.no: Edge node som single point of failure, over-privileged
saarbarhet.en: Edge node that single point of failure, over-privileged

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Micro-segmentation, least privilege, attestation, anomaly detection
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Micro-segmentation, least privilege, attestation, anomaly detection

risikoelement.no: Fysisk tilgang til edge-enhet i usikret lokasjon
risikoelement.en: Physical access to an edge device in an unsecured location

saarbarhet.no: Edge nodes i remote/public locations, ingen physical security
saarbarhet.en: Edge nodes in remote/public locations, no physical security

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Encrypted storage, tamper detection, secure boot, remote wipe capability
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Encrypted storage, tamper detection, secure boot, remote wipe capability

risikoelement.no: Edge ML-modeller kan bli stjålet eller poisoned
risikoelement.en: Edge ML-modeller can bli stolen or poisoned

saarbarhet.no: Modeller deployert til edge uten beskyttelse
saarbarhet.en: Models are deployed to edge environments without adequate protection

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Modellkryptering, TEE for inference, model watermarking og federated learning
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Model encryption, TEE for inference, model watermarking, federated learning
